perturbation.original_text: Accordingly, unless required by applicable law, we agree that prior to the execution of a Sale Agreement with respect to the closing of a Possible Transaction, without the prior written consent of the Company, we will not, and we will direct our representatives not to, disclose to any person either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a possible transaction between us and the Company or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such Possible Transaction, including the status thereof unless we are advised by counsel that we are required to make such disclosure.
perturbation.changed_text: Accordingly, unless required by applicable law or unless we deem it necessary to inform our shareholders, we agree that prior to the execution of a Sale Agreement with respect to the closing of a Possible Transaction, without the prior written consent of the Company, we will not, and we will direct our representatives not to, disclose to any person either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a possible transaction between us and the Company or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such Possible Transaction, including the status thereof unless we are advised by counsel that we are required to make such disclosure.
perturbation.explanation: Adding 'or unless we deem it necessary to inform our shareholders' creates a loophole in the non-disclosure agreement. The original text is clear about not disclosing information without the Company's consent, unless legally required. This addition introduces Carpenter Technology Corporation's subjective determination of necessity, leading to potential breaches of confidentiality and in-text contradiction by undermining the other clauses aimed at complete confidentiality. The phrase 'we deem it necessary' creates ambiguity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: We understand and agree that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by us or our representatives and that the Company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by us or our representatives but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds 'or unless we deem it necessary to inform our shareholders,' which creates a loophole in the non-disclosure agreement. The original text was clear about not disclosing information without the Company's consent, unless legally required. The contradicted text states that money damages would not be sufficient for a breach of the agreement and that the company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief. The added loophole creates ambiguity and allows for subjective determination of necessity, potentially leading to breaches of confidentiality, directly undermining the contradicted section's aim for complete confidentiality and guaranteed remedies. Therefore it is a strong contradiction based on the definition provided.

perturbation.original_text: Upon the Company's request, we shall promptly deliver to the Company or destroy all written Evaluation Materials and any other written materials without retaining, in whole or in part, any copies, extracts or other reproductions (whatever the form or storage medium) of such materials.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon the Company's reasonable request, we shall deliver to the Company or destroy all written Evaluation Materials and any other written materials without retaining, in whole or in part, any copies, extracts or other reproductions (whatever the form or storage medium) of such materials, unless we determine that retaining certain documents is required for legal compliance or internal record-keeping.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the phrase 'reasonable request' and 'unless we determine that retaining certain documents is required for legal compliance or internal record-keeping,' the obligation to return or destroy documents becomes subjective. Initially, the obligation was absolute, but this change allows Carpenter Technology Corporation to retain documents based on their own determination of legal compliance or internal needs. This introduces ambiguity and directly contradicts the other confidentiality clauses, creating an in-text contradiction. It weakens the Company's control over its confidential information. The word 'reasonable' adds to the ambiguity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: We will treat confidentially any information (whether written or oral) that either the Company or its financial advisor, J.P. Morgan & Co. Incorporated ("JPM"), or the Company's other representatives furnish to us in connection with a Possible Transaction involving the Company, together with analyses, compilations, studies or other documents prepared by us, or by our representatives (as defined below) which contain or otherwise reflect such information or our review of, or interest in, the Company (collectively, the "Evaluation Materials"). We recognize and acknowledge the competitive value of the Evaluation Materials and the damage that could result to the Company if the Evaluation Materials were used or disclosed except as authorized by this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates the prompt delivery or destruction of all written Evaluation Materials without retaining any copies. The changed text introduces an exception allowing the retention of documents if deemed necessary for legal compliance or internal record-keeping. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which emphasizes the confidential treatment of Evaluation Materials and the potential damage from unauthorized use or disclosure. The change weakens the original obligation to maintain confidentiality and control over the Evaluation Materials by introducing a subjective determination of retention needs, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction as it allows for retention when the original text and contradicted text do not allow for it.
